title: Ḑank Heat Wave
lead: Ḑank is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +6.63. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level.
body:
The current heat wave in Ḑank has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10. 
 The city is witnessing very low humidity at 12% and moderate wind speeds of 14.9 km/h. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) have reached 22.2 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
